title: Release script font + specimen + language-coverage report under OFL
context: M2 culminates in a tagged release of the community co-designed script font after native-reader correctness review (fonts-script-203) passes. Per the Elyos quality bar, a font is delivered — not merely merged — when it passes automated QA, has complete OFL/FONTLOG/provenance artifacts, and achieves at least one real adoption event: community use or Noto/Google Fonts upstreaming initiated.
objective: Package and tag the first release of the community co-designed script font with static OTF/TTF, variable TTF, WOFF2, type specimen, language-coverage report, OFL.txt/FONTLOG.txt/provenance.json crediting the community, and at least one adoption event.
acceptanceCriteria: Tagged release includes: static OTF, static TTF, variable TTF, WOFF2, type specimen, OFL.txt, FONTLOG.txt (crediting the community as co-designer), provenance.json.
Language-coverage report shows the primary target language(s) fully covered per gflanguages/Hyperglot.
Native-reader correctness review (fonts-script-203) has passed (100%) before this release proceeds.
All CI/QA gates pass: FontBakery Universal + GF profiles (no FAIL), HarfBuzz shaping diff clean against community test strings, reproducible build verified.
At least one adoption event is documented: community use confirmed, or an upstream PR to Noto/Google Fonts initiated.
No secrets, tokens, or API keys are present in release artifacts or CI logs.
output: A pull request and tagged release of the community co-designed script font including static + variable + WOFF2, type specimen, language-coverage report, complete OFL/FONTLOG/provenance artifacts crediting the community, and at least one documented adoption event.
